forkPolicy: Public forks may be cataloged intentionally, but the live drift audit tracks active non-fork repositories by default because the portfolio's headline repo count follows owned source work.

intentionallySkippedPublicRepos.reason: Personal script grab bag; intentionally omitted from the polished public portfolio catalog.

GitHub profile repository; not a portfolio project.

privacyReviewRequired.reason: Public X-ray and medical-imaging repo. Keep excluded from the portfolio until visibility and public-safety review is explicitly resolved.
